commit.message:
Especificacao v4.0: escopo completo com IA, IoT, financeiro, clima e geolocalizacao

Promove todas as extensoes futuras para v1.0:
- Multi-granja com dashboard consolidado e comparativo
- Sanidade: vacinacoes, medicamentos, visitantes, biosseguridade, GTA digital
- Financeiro: custos de producao, remuneracao, resultado liquido
- IA Preditiva via Gemini API: predicao peso, anomalias, recomendacoes, analise foto, chat
- Dashboard Web (React) para administradores e integradoras
- IoT completo: MQTT subscriber, sensores, alertas, dashboard tempo real
- Blockchain simplificada (hash chain PostgreSQL) para rastreabilidade
- Previsao do tempo via Open-Meteo com alertas meteorologicos
- Geolocalizacao de galpoes: GPS, orientacao, dimensoes, tipo ventilacao
- Visualizacao grafica: mapa com galpoes orientados, incidencia vento/sol, simulacao 24h
- 25+ novas tabelas no schema, 30+ novos endpoints, criterios de aceite expandidos

commit.message:
feat: Procreate-like brush system, bug fixes, star/glow brushes

Brush engine:
- New BrushType: glow (additive 'lighter' composite, halo + core)
- New BrushType: star (starburst/lens-flare with radiant spikes, 4 or 8 branches)
- Flow control: per-dot paint density, independent from opacity
- Color Dynamics: hue/saturation/brightness jitter per dot (HSL conversion)
- Airbrush: rewritten dot density formula (area-proportional, correct alpha)

Presets — 37 builtin in 7 Sets (Croquis/Encrage/Peinture/Calligraphie/Aérographe/Textures/Lumière):
- Lumière set: Lueur douce, Lueur intense, Traînée lumineuse, Puit de lumière, Étincelles, Néon
- Starburst: Éblouissement ×4, ×8, Micro-étoile, Pluie d'étoiles, Flare anamorphique
- scatter param controls 4 vs 8 spikes; angleJitter rotates star randomly

Blend modes: 6 → 16 (Color Dodge, Burn, Hard/Soft Light, Difference, Exclusion, Hue, Sat, Color, Luminosity)

Brush Studio dialog: tabbed editor (Trait/Grain/Dynamique/Couleur) with live stroke preview

BrushOptions: Flow slider, Color Dynamics tab, pressure toggles (P.Size/P.Opac/P.Flow), Studio button

Layer panel: 16 blend modes grouped, Merge visible + Flatten all via ⋮ menu

Selection: Ctrl+A select all, Ctrl+D deselect, Ctrl+Shift+I invert (rect + mask)

Menu Edition: Annuler/Rétablir (Undo/Redo) + selection ops

Bug fixes:
- Fill: bypass commitDrawingToLayer (was overwriting flood fill result)
- selectAll/invertSelection: fixed Rect w/h → width/height
- Airbrush: was nearly invisible at small sizes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.description: Editeur de dessin numerique Electron React Canvas 2D

commit.message:
Fix Neon TLS by stripping sslmode from URL and using manual SSL config

Neon's pooler uses an IP address (not hostname), causing pg's verify-full
to fail on certificate hostname check. Strip sslmode=require from URL and
set ssl: { rejectUnauthorized: false } manually on pg.Pool instead.

Also installed @neondatabase/serverless + @prisma/adapter-neon (unused
for now but available as alternative).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Remove ALL dollar signs ($) from user-facing displays platform-wide

Comprehensive sweep across 55 files eliminating every literal $ character
from user-visible text. This is a poker chip platform — all values are
chips, not dollars.

Changes include:
- JSX display values: removed $ prefix before {value} expressions
- Component prop defaults: changed currency='$' to currency=''
- Currency symbols: replaced $ with ◉ (chip icon) where contextual
- Tournament names: replaced $X with X Chip (HorseOrchestrator)
- Achievement descriptions: replaced $X with chip amounts
- Filter labels: removed $ from stakes range labels
- Export HTML templates: removed $ prefix from all value displays
- Quick-amount buttons: changed $50/$100/$500 to 50/100/500
- Poker stats: W$SD → WSD, VPIP description updated

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(x402s): resolve all SCP audit findings — replay, TOCTOU, asset/close/liveness checks

Critical:
- Credit withdraw: atomic debit-before-send prevents TOCTOU double-spend
- Credit withdraw + credit/pay: nonce in signed message prevents replay

High:
- Continuation issues now re-validate on-chain liveness (isClosing, expiry)
- Client: remove duplicate _sv() that clobbered state
- Client: nonce monotonicity — reject hub nonce < local nonce
- Client: verify close state balA+balB == onChain total before signing

Medium:
- First issue verifies channel asset matches quoted asset
- confirm-close uses hub-stored creditApplied (not caller input)
- Storage.get/set restored — handle routes no longer crash

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: dev mode (?dev=1) for local development + correlation detail display

## Changes
- stats.html: ?dev=1 param でローカルデータを使って認証なし管理者モードで起動
  - public/dev-data.json を読み込み（KVから書き出したスナップショット）
  - 冒頭のトークンチェックと底部のrequireAuth()呼び出しの両方をバイパス
  - piscine_result もローカルデータから読み込み合否相関が確認可能
- stats.html: 相関係数チャートに詳細情報を追加
  - 各バーの下にサンプル数・合格/不合格グループ平均・σを表示
  - pbCorr() の返り値に sn, n1, n0 を追加、console.log でデバッグ情報出力
- .gitignore: public/dev-data.json を除外（機密データ含む）

## 使い方（ローカル開発）
```
python3 -m http.server 8765 --directory public
# ブラウザで http://localhost:8765/stats.html?dev=1 を開く
```

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: harden Skill Auditor + Threat Cloud from security audit

Skill Auditor (8 files):
- CRITICAL: Add prompt isolation delimiters for LLM analysis (anti-injection)
- CRITICAL: SAST failure now returns warn+finding instead of silent pass
- HIGH: Critical-override in risk scorer — any critical finding forces CRITICAL level
- HIGH: Permission check severity calibration (high-risk → high severity)
- HIGH: Add 5 new permission patterns (SSH, cron, Docker, env injection, clipboard)
- HIGH: Expand reverse shell detection (Python, PowerShell, Perl, PHP)
- HIGH: Expand jailbreak vocab (developer mode, god mode, STAN, etc.)
- HIGH: Expand identity override patterns (6 new synonyms)
- HIGH: Add hex-encoded payload detection
- HIGH: Add fullwidth Latin detection (word-boundary bypass)
- HIGH: Expand Unicode steganography (Tag block, Hangul filler, annotation)
- MEDIUM: Fix dependency-check status always returning 'info'
- MEDIUM: AI findings now use correct category instead of hardcoded prompt-injection
- MEDIUM: yaml.load() now uses JSON_SCHEMA (safe mode)
- MEDIUM: Add 1MB file size limit to manifest parser
- LOW: Remove dead scriptFileCount variable from code-check

Threat Cloud:
- HIGH: Client enforces HTTPS in production (rejects http:// baseUrl)
- MEDIUM: Add AbortSignal.timeout to all fetch calls (10s submit, 5s lookup)

Tests updated to match new critical-override behavior.

commit.message:
feat: enable optional auth + wire chat to real agent backend E2E

Switch all backend routes from get_current_user (strict 401) to
get_optional_user which returns a guest User when no token is present,
allowing the app to work without Cognito login during development.
Make WebSocket token optional. Add startSession/stopSession/getHistory
REST methods to ChatService. Update AgentChat to provision a real
container session before connecting WebSocket. Fix dashboard endpoint
path (/api/dashboard → /api/dashboard/stats).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove dead nonce code and revert CSP to nonce-free policy (#35)

The nonce was generated in proxy.ts and read in layout.tsx but never
applied to any script elements, making the nonce protection ineffective.
Per CSP Level 3, a nonce in script-src causes 'unsafe-inline' to be
ignored by compliant browsers, which would block Next.js hydration scripts.

Remove the nonce variable from layout.tsx and revert proxy.ts CSP to
a straightforward 'unsafe-inline' policy that actually works.

Closes #33

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: prevent STT false positives (reserve→reservation, sit→see)

Add shared prefix check (≥4 chars) to detect same-root words like
reserve/reservation. Tighten short-word rule to require exact same
length and same ending char type (vowel/consonant) to prevent
corrections like sit→see while preserving valid ones like bed→bag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(master): demote lingering AL error latch log from warning to debug

Stale AL error bits after a prior session crash are cleared during INIT
verification and do not block startup. Logging them as warnings is noise.

Add Site Manager Agent and comprehensive testing

Features:
- Site Manager Agent chat interface at /agent
- Markdown rendering with clickable links
- Shared agent logic between web and WhatsApp
- WhatsApp webhook moved to Vercel API route (/api/whatsapp)
- User profile page at /profile

Architecture improvements:
- Unified agent core (lib/agent/) shared by web and WhatsApp
- WhatsApp webhook now on Vercel instead of Supabase Edge Function
- Middleware configured to skip auth for API routes
- Clean separation: Vercel for app logic, Supabase for data

Testing:
- Playwright e2e tests for web UI
- Test workflow runs backend + e2e tests
- Deploy workflow depends on tests passing
- Full local testing capability

CI/CD improvements:
- Separate test and deploy workflows
- Tests run on every push/PR
- Deployment only after tests pass
- Test artifacts uploaded for debugging

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Support paris Question (Oui/Non, buteur, essai, performance joueur)

Pari.cs :
- Ajout propriété IsQuestion : détecte via Selection (Oui/Non) ou
  Marché (contient ?, buteur, marque, essai, scorer, carton, etc.)

PromptBuilder.cs :
- Routage : IsQuestion → BuildQuestionPrompt / BuildFullQuestion
  (priorité sur IsLive et ValueBet)
- BuildQuestionPrompt : prompt compact MCP avec recherche joueur
  sur Sofascore + Transfermarkt + stats match
- BuildFullQuestion : prompt complet avec template question.md intégré
- McpQuestionLines : URLs MCP ciblées stats joueur
- ExtraireNomJoueur : parsing intelligent du marché pour isoler
  le nom du joueur (ex: "M. Mbappé marque ?" → "M. Mbappé")
- Enregistré dans ProtocolFiles pour le system prompt global

Resources/Prompts/question.md :
- Template complet d'analyse value bet pour paris binaires joueur
- 5 modules : Identification, Stats individuelles, Défense adverse,
  Estimation probabilité (xG/90, Poisson, ajustements contextuels),
  Comparaison marché + verdict
- Seuils adaptés aux props (écarts plus bas que 1N2)
- Score de confiance sur 20 points

Scripts/extracteur_mesParis.js :
- Mode 1 (Mes Paris) : détecte type="Question" via sélection et marché
- Mode 2 (Page cotes) : idem, tag les paris question automatiquement

commit.message:
feat: Phase 5 + Phase 6 - 练习复测对比、反馈收集、Worker线程、增量导入

Phase 5：
- ai:completePracticePlan 接口：7天后重新计算亲密度，更新 intimacy_after，状态改为 completed
- PracticeView 重构：全部完成后显示"触发复测"按钮，展示练习前后亲密度对比横幅（含涨跌分析）
- 每日任务支持展开反馈记录（📝 按钮），独立保存 notes 到 practice_records.feedback

Phase 6：
- 新增 worker/import.worker.js：将 parseChatLog 解析移至 Worker 线程，主进程不阻塞
- data.js 重构 importTextChat：异步调用 parseInWorker，DB 写入仍在主线程事务中
- 增量导入去重：消息 ID 改为 contact+timestamp+sender+内容指纹的 base64 哈希，重复消息自动跳过
- ImportView 显示跳过重复消息数量（"成功导入 X 条，跳过重复 Y 条"）

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(logging): apply indexing_pressure via API, re-enable Trace_Error for diagnosis

- Remove indexing_pressure.memory.limit from opensearch.yml (causes format
  crashes — static setting parsing is fragile)
- Apply the setting via cluster API in the setup job instead (reliable,
  always runs after every ArgoCD sync)
- Re-enable Trace_Error On in Fluent Bit to see the actual HTTP error
  OpenSearch is returning — previous 429 fix may not be the root cause
